summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend review of Customer Management Portal. 33/33 backend pytest tests pass (auth, dashboard, customers, products, licenses, reports, users, notifications, activity-logs, role enforcement). Frontend smoke tested: login/dashboard/sidebar nav/theme toggle/notifications/user menu logout/role-based UI gating all working. Light & dark themes render. Three role accounts (admin/manager/viewer) all login successfully with httpOnly cookies (samesite=none, secure=true). Bcrypt hashes are properly generated ($2b$).

minor.issue: Requires full CustomerIn payload (company_name, customer_name etc.); does not support partial updates - returns 422 if missing fields. Frontend should always submit full record.
Same: requires full ProductIn payload - no partial update support.
Endpoint not implemented (returns 405). GET /api/customers/{id} exists but products & licenses do not have single-resource GET. Minor REST gap; UI uses list responses so OK.

issues: First load showed Product Distribution donut empty briefly before chart rendered (possibly initial 0 data); resolves on subsequent visits.

action_items: Optional: Make PUT /customers/{id} & PUT /products/{id} support partial updates (Pydantic v2 model with all-optional fields, then $set only provided keys) to align with REST conventions and reduce frontend payload size.
Optional: Add GET /api/products/{id} and GET /api/licenses/{id} for completeness.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 826 lines (just under 1000-line ceiling but past 700-line guideline) - consider splitting into routers/{auth,customers,products,licenses,reports,users}.py for maintainability.
JWT cookies use samesite=none + secure=true which is correct for cross-site preview domain; verified by login round-trip via httpOnly cookies.
Role guards require_admin/require_manager are correctly enforced (verified 200 admin / 403 manager DELETE customer; 403 viewer POST; 403 manager+viewer GET /users).
License status is computed at read-time which is good (no stale field). Status values match spec: Active/Expiring Soon/Expired.
Mongo _id correctly excluded everywhere via {'_id': 0} projection.
No bcrypt-in-env or load_dotenv-timing issues observed. Seed admin updates existing admin user is in place.
Backend log_activity logs all writes; activity-logs endpoint correctly admin-gated.
Frontend uses axios withCredentials; data-testid coverage is good (login form, sidebar nav, topbar theme/notif/user menu, menu-logout, notif-items).
test_credentials: admin@cmportal.com/Admin@123, manager@cmportal.com/Manager@123, viewer@cmportal.com/Viewer@123 (all working, role-based access enforced).
seed_data_creation: No new seed created. Backend self-seeds 12 customers, 11 products, 38 active licenses on first start. Cleaned up TEST_-prefixed leftovers post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression suite (33 tests, fast ~7s). Use admin/manager/viewer credentials above. Note that PUT /customers and PUT /products require FULL payload (no partial update). License POST schema fields: customer_id, product_id, license_key, purchase_date, activation_date, expiry_date, license_count, cost (NOT seats/price/start_date/end_date). UI testids: login-email-input, login-password-input, theme-toggle-btn, notif-btn, user-menu-btn, menu-logout, nav-{label-kebab}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no critical bugs; only minor REST design notes (no single-resource GET for products/licenses, full-body PUT requirement).
